site.description: Plan weekly meals together, keep the history and share changes instantly.
footer.createdWith: Menu Diario, a lightweight web app to decide what to eat together.
home.title: Write down the daily menu and decide the week together
home.description: Plan breakfasts, lunches and dinners, browse the history, reuse saved dishes and decide together what to eat every day.
home.appDescription: Sign in to edit the weekly menu, create new weeks and share them with more people.
home.loginDescription: If you already have an open session, we will take you straight to your private dashboard. Otherwise, sign in with Google or continue as guest.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.enabledMeals: What do you want to configure
dashboard.noMeal: I will not plan this meal for this day
dashboard.reasonEatingOut: I am not eating at home
dashboard.reasonNotHungry: I do not feel like eating
history.title: History
history.description: Search previous days by date and edit them if you need to correct something.
history.empty: There are no days in this range.
group.title: Group
group.description: Share the code so other people can join your group.
group.copied: Code copied. Send it to the other person so they can join.
menu.configMissing: Configure Firebase with PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* variables to enable the app.
menu.emptyList: There are no weeks in this section yet.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist, has moved or has not been created yet.
